LocalAccount.Name: tappaas
LocalAccount.Description: TAPPaaS automation account — SSH key auth only

SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NonInteractive -Command "Add-Content C:\tappaas-setup.log ('[{0}] TAPPaaS OOBE first-logon starting' -f (Get-Date -f 'HH:mm:ss'))"

powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NonInteractive -Command "$d='C:\ProgramData\ssh'; [System.IO.Directory]::CreateDirectory($d)|Out-Null; Set-Content -Path ($d+'\administrators_authorized_keys') -Value '__TAPPAAS_SSH_PUBKEY__' -Encoding ASCII; Add-Content C:\tappaas-setup.log ('[{0}] SSH key written' -f (Get-Date -f 'HH:mm:ss'))"

powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NonInteractive -Command "$f='C:\ProgramData\ssh\administrators_authorized_keys'; icacls $f /inheritance:r /grant 'SYSTEM:(F)' /grant 'Administrators:(F)'|Out-Null; Add-Content C:\tappaas-setup.log ('[{0}] SSH key permissions set' -f (Get-Date -f 'HH:mm:ss'))"

powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NonInteractive -Command "if(-not(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\OpenSSH')){New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\OpenSSH' -Force|Out-Null}; New-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\OpenSSH' -Name DefaultShell -Value 'C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe' -PropertyType String -Force|Out-Null; Add-Content C:\tappaas-setup.log ('[{0}] PowerShell set as default SSH shell' -f (Get-Date -f 'HH:mm:ss'))"

powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NonInteractive -Command "Set-Service sshd -StartupType Automatic -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service sshd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $s=(Get-Service sshd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Status; Add-Content C:\tappaas-setup.log ('[{0}] sshd: {1}' -f (Get-Date -f 'HH:mm:ss'),$s)"

powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NonInteractive -Command "Get-NetConnectionProfile|ForEach-Object{Set-NetConnectionProfile -InterfaceIndex $_.InterfaceIndex -NetworkCategory Private}; Set-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName 'OpenSSH SSH Server (sshd)' -Profile Any -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if(-not(Get-NetFirewallRule -Name 'OpenSSH-Server-In-TCP' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)){New-NetFirewallRule -Name 'OpenSSH-Server-In-TCP' -DisplayName 'OpenSSH SSH Server (sshd)' -Enabled True -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -Action Allow -LocalPort 22 -Profile Any|Out-Null}; Add-Content C:\tappaas-setup.log ('[{0}] Network=Private, SSH firewall=Any profile' -f (Get-Date -f 'HH:mm:ss'))"
powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NonInteractive -Command "Add-Content C:\tappaas-setup.log ('[{0}] TAPPaaS OOBE setup complete — SSH ready' -f (Get-Date -f 'HH:mm:ss'))"
